problem id: 19f4b3d6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(6)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  01110110 -> 10000001
  10100100 -> 00000010
  00011010 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00000000
  11101100 -> 00000011
  00100000 -> 00000000
  10100001 -> 00000010
  00101111 -> 10000000
  00000110 -> 00000000
  10011100 -> 00000010

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 00000011
